ranking.selection_reason: Lowest-tier quality-passing profile. It met all hard gates and avoided the extra topology-payload blocker introduced by several stronger candidates.
Slightly cleaner dependency framing and lower CLI proxy output tokens, but uses a stronger model family without enough quality gain to displace the mini primary.

rejected_summary.low_effort_mini: Too likely to compress away required sections or blur missing versus present items.
rejected_summary.stronger_low_effort_profiles: Rejected when they introduced a topology payload blocker not required by the frozen fixture.
